_meta.keyKnowledge: We compose music using elements of music and compositional devices, and we notate, document or record our compositions.

_source.w: We compose music using elements of music and compositional devices, and we notate, document or record our compositions.
y: Composing develops our ability to express original ideas through the language of music.
Notating and recording our work means it can be performed by others and preserved.
Understanding compositional devices gives us the structural tools to create effective music.
eg: We compose an original piece that uses contrast, repetition and development to create interest.
We use notation software or audio recording to document our compositions.
We compose for specific ensembles or instruments, considering their capabilities and range.
We experiment with compositional devices like ostinato, sequence, inversion and augmentation.
We compose music that responds to a brief, theme or stimulus.
We share our compositions with others and use feedback to refine our work.
